name: Mastra (TypeScript AI Agent Framework)
pricing_notes: Open source (Elastic License 2.0); Mastra Inc; Cloud hosting coming

auth.notes: LLM provider API keys (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.); Mastra Cloud auth upcoming

agent_readiness.notes: TypeScript-native AI agent framework. new Agent({ instructions, model, tools }). Built-in: MCP client integration, RAG (vector stores), workflow engine (durable multi-step), memory (in-context + persistent), voice/speech. Integrations: 100+ tools via @mastra/tools. Vercel AI SDK compatible. Works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral. Local development server. Rapid development — raised $20M seed 2025. Competes with LangChain for TypeScript. Positioning as 'the Next.js of AI'.

gotchas: Elastic License 2.0 (not fully open source — no competing SaaS)
Documentation still catching up to features
best_when: Projects needing MCP tool integration in TypeScript
Teams wanting Vercel AI SDK compatibility with more structure
avoid_when: Projects needing competing SaaS (Elastic License restriction)
summary: Mastra is a TypeScript-native AI agent framework. Agents with tools, MCP integration, RAG, durable workflows, memory, voice. 100+ built-in tools. Vercel AI SDK compatible. OpenAI/Anthropic/Google support. Raised $20M seed 2025 — rapidly growing. Pre-v1 with breaking changes. Elastic License 2.0. Best for TypeScript teams building structured AI agent applications. Python teams: use PydanticAI or LangChain.
